rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no operative connection to Educ. Code §29.0031, which governs dyslexia evaluation procedures, team composition, and parental notification requirements. The statute contains no funding formulas or dollar thresholds.
_note: No conflict. The rule addresses special education evaluation procedures for dyslexia and related disorders; it contains no references to homestead exemption amounts, property tax values, or school funding formulas that would be affected by the proposed change.
